Crypt.summary: Encrypt or decrypt an array of bytes.

CryptRaw.summary: Encrypt or decrypt a string handling its characters as single bytes (high order byte is ignored)
CryptRaw.param: Key to use for the encryption
CryptRaw.returns: Encrypted text. This has the same length as the original text

LoadResString.summary: Look up an identifier in a string table and returns its corresponding string.

MBSubstr.summary: Extract a substring from a string — both the substring and the string can contain double-byte characters.

NamedArg.summary: VO Compatible type to allow name/value pairs for Ole Automation parameters

OleDateTime.summary: VO Compatible class to store DateTime values in OLE Automation

OleDateTime.AsReal8.summary: Returns the DateTime value as Real8 (the format that is used in COM).

OleDateTime.AsString.summary: Returns the dateTime value as a String.

OleDateTime.ctor.param: This can be a Number, Date or String. A Number will be seen as a REAL8 value in OADate form, Date = Date part and String = TimePart.

OleDateTime.DateTime.summary: The value as a .Net DateTime type.

OleDateTime.DateVal.summary: The value of the date part of the DateTime object as a Date.

OleDateTime.TimeString.summary: The value of the time part of the DateTime object as a String.

OleDateTime.TimeVal.summary: The value of the time part of the DateTime object as a float.

OleDateTimeAsDate.summary: Set and/or Retrieve the setting that determines if OLE date values should be returned as VO date values or as DateTime values
OleDateTimeAsDate.param: The new setting. FALSE allows the return values to be instances of the OleDateTime class, TRUE forces all OLE DateTime values to be VO dates . The default is FALSE.

VObject.summary: Base class for many types used in the VO SDK Classes

VObject.Destroy.summary: Free memory resources allocated for a VObject object and its derived objects.
